ksa_text: Knowledge of AI risk assessment and bias detection methodologies for privacy and security, including fairness assessment, privacy risk evaluation across AI lifecycle, trustworthiness evaluation frameworks, and detection techniques for bias in data and models.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: knowledge maps directly to AI Transparency and Documentation Specialist scope — RSK-specific signals detected ("risk assess", "ai risk", "bias detect"). STRM composite is zero (0.0000 — note: STRM frameworks underweight pure risk vocabulary); note that framework scores routinely underweight risk management and governance vocabulary, so text-based signal carries primary weight here. Seniority is appropriate: the KSA describes practice-level execution, not enterprise strategy.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation present: 2 match(es) in RSK job postings or certification scope. Competency appears in RSK role descriptions — sufficient to uphold.
